series_metadata.series_description: Records used to track compliance with Assurance of Voluntary Compliance (AVC) Agreements or Final Judgments between the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO) and suppliers. Records can include, but may not be limited to, a copy of the AVC or Final Judgment agreement, case summary, information about the debt and debtor, payment tracking and copies of checks, restitution list, late payment letters, correspondence, certificate of judgment and referral to Collections Enforcement section.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: compliance matter closed or 40 years if referred Collections Enforcement, unless notified that Collections Enforcement has closed matter. ; Paper: compliance matter closed or 40 years if referred Collections Enforcement, unless notified that Collections Enforcement has closed matter. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately
